chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 479 of 2021 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 30.08.2023 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Record shows that since 2021 no one has pursued this petition. accordingly, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
